params.decimals_: Number of decimals (e.g. 8 for USD feeds)
params.initialAnswer: The first price answer to return

getRoundData(uint80).details: Only the latest round is tracked; historical rounds return zeros.

returns.roundId: Echo of the requested round ID

returns.updatedAt: Timestamp when the answer was last set

setUpdatedAt(uint256).details: Call after setAnswer to simulate stale data.

params.timestamp: Unix timestamp to set as updatedAt

constructor.notice: Initialises the mock aggregator with an answer and decimal count

getRoundData(uint80).notice: Returns data for a specific historical round (dummy values)

setAnswer(int256).notice: Updates the mock price and stamps updatedAt to block.timestamp

setUpdatedAt(uint256).notice: Overrides the updatedAt timestamp for staleness testing
